nasb.text: For the Lord will execute judgment by fire And by His sword on all flesh, And those slain by the Lord will be many.

esv.text: For by fire will the Lord enter into judgment, and by his sword, with all flesh; and those slain by the Lord shall be many.

cnv.text: 因為耶和華必用火和刀劍， 在所有的人身上施行審判， 被耶和華所殺的人必定很多。

ccb.text: 因为耶和华要用火和剑审判世人，杀死许多人。

csbs.text: 因为耶和华必以烈火和他的刀剑审判一切有血肉的； 那时被耶和华所杀的人会很多。
